commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a direct WebChat user-message transcript append before live transcript notifications and also adds Claude CLI turn-correlation logging/tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level non-agent WebChat path: current main emits live user transcript updates while chat.history is rebuilt from durable JSONL, and the no-agent branch appends assistant output without an obvious user-row disk write. I did not run a live WebChat reconnect proof in this read-only review.
